completion_summary: Implemented the no-force formal preflight with clean wheel/source, dependency, control hash, split/denylist, method registration, checkpoint/prompt/pricing, resource, disk/CPU/GPU/API quota checks and private-public issuance separation; all 15 method IDs passed a 17-cell two-track assigned/masked nonformal replay smoke, with 14 focused and 161 extended tests passing.
scope: Implement a no-force formal preflight that verifies clean source/build provenance, backend and protocol hashes, private seed/split commitments, reference and method readiness, checkpoints/prompts/pricing, budgets and infrastructure before issuing one immutable run manifest
